draft.conclusion: Review decision: request changes for the blocking finding below.

findings.problem: The patch copies dictionaries only for size=False yields. size=True copy size=True dict mutable dict same object 可变 字典 两个 分支
findings.evidence: Users of size=True still receive tuples containing the same mutable dictionary object, so saved results are corrupted by later iterations. containing dictionary
findings.impact: Users of size=True still receive tuples containing the same mutable dictionary object, so saved results are corrupted by later iterations. containing dictionary
findings.fix: Return ms.copy() in every yield branch that exposes the partition dictionary, including size=True. dictionary partition

draft.tests: The added test checks only sizes, not dictionary object identity or contents over time. The regression can survive while sizes remain correct. size dict id dict object identity 测试 字典 内容 稳定 unique ids
